meta.game: Portland Trail Blazers at Phoenix Suns

POR.headline: Suns square off against the Trail Blazers in play-in game
POR.description: Portland Trail Blazers (42-40, eighth in the Western Conference) vs. Phoenix Suns (45-37, seventh in the Western Conference)

POR.headline: 2025-26 NBA championship odds: Thunder, Celtics favored in respective conferences
POR.description: The Thunder are the favorites to win the NBA championship, and the Celtics are favored to represent the Eastern Conference.

POR.headline: NBA playoffs 2026: Previewing all 20 teams still vying for the title
POR.description: Everything you need to know for the Thunder, Pistons, Spurs, Celtics and 16 other teams chasing the 2026 NBA title.

POR.headline: Trail Blazers beat the Kings 122-110 to clinch the No. 8 seed and a play-in spot
POR.description: — Deni Avdija had 25 points and 10 assists, Jrue Holiday scored 23 points, and the Portland Trail Blazers beat the Sacramento Kings 122-110 on Sunday night to clinch the No. 8 seed and a spot in the Western Conference play-in tournament.
